name: quadrant
description: Native 2×2 scatter chart — items plotted on two continuous axes.
purpose: Use to position items by two numeric attributes (cost × value, effort × impact). Data-driven; for static categorical 2×2 grids, use matrix-2x2.

items.description: One li per item. Format: `Label — x, y[, size]`.

skeleton:
<!-- _class: quadrant -->

`Effort 0–10 → Reach 0–100`

## Where to put the next dollar.

Effort estimated in story-points; reach as percent of addressable users.

- Strategic Bets
  - Codebook caching `3, 70`
  - Multi-tenant DEKs `5, 85`
- Quick Wins
  - Per-purpose codebooks `8, 80`
  - Snapshot exports `9, 55`
- Defer
  - Vendor scoping `2, 30`
  - Manual rotation `1, 22`
- Time Sinks
  - Custom audit log UI `7, 18`
  - Bespoke SCIM `9, 28`
